description: The literal type-token `any` in a type-annotation position fires E-TYPE-ANY-FORBIDDEN (§14.x). `any` is not a type in scrml — the field `a: any` is rejected and the diagnostic steers the author to `asIs`. Incidental W-PROGRAM-SPA-INFERRED is ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §14.x the literal `any` token is rejected in EVERY type-annotation position (E-TYPE-ANY-FORBIDDEN); previously it collapsed silently to `asIs`. The diagnostic points the author to the explicit `asIs` escape hatch.
